title: OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: KAIROS COASTLINE SERVICES OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient services including individual counseling, family therapy, group therapy, skills coaching, family support, peer support, wrap-around services, and case management. 2020 Thompson Road Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Youth ages 0-24 Hours: Varies Email (541) 956-4943 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 267-3511 Main phone (541) 267-3512 FAX Main phone (541) 956-4943 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
